name: Lead Orchestrator
role: Reads plan, decomposes phases, issues contracts, gates work

name: Data Engineer
role: Data loading, cleaning, validation, schema design, drift detection

name: Model Builder
role: Architecture design, loss functions, hyperparameter search, training

name: Oracle / QA
role: Executes oracle criteria, reports pass/fail with evidence

name: Code Reviewer
role: Reviews all code, enforces conventions, catches security issues

name: Test Engineer
role: Writes and runs unit, integration, regression, and edge case tests

name: Research Scout
role: Literature review, prior art survey, baseline identification

name: XAI Agent
role: Feature importance, model interpretation, explainability analysis

name: Domain Evaluator
role: Business/domain coherence, edge cases, distributional shift

name: ML Engineer
role: Productionisation, containerisation, inference optimisation

name: Infra Engineer
role: Compute allocation, experiment tracking, artifact storage

name: Plan Architect
role: Drafts compliant plan.md from source documents and data

name: Data Scout
role: Inspects raw data during plan drafting for quality and schema

name: Init Architect
role: Conversational project setup, environment detection, scaffolding

name: Software Architect
role: Decomposes platform into buildable modules, defines contracts

name: Backend Engineer
role: Builds core ZO infrastructure: memory, orchestration, comms

name: Frontend Engineer
role: Command dashboard, agent panel, live log viewer

name: Platform Test Engineer
role: Tests all ZO modules: unit, integration, end-to-end

name: Platform Code Reviewer
role: Reviews platform code, enforces coding conventions

name: Documentation Agent
role: Maintains docstrings, README, API documentation
